name: dime-vendored
description: Vendored Anthropic-marketplace plugins (superpowers, mcp-server-dev, figma). The upstream marketplace names are reserved for GitHub anthropics sources, so they are rehosted here to rehydrate offline.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Superpowers teaches Claude brainstorming, subagent driven development with built in code review, systematic debugging, and red/green TDD. Additionally, it teaches Claude how to author and test new skills.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude. Guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

plugins.name: figma
plugins.description: Figma design platform integration. Access design files, extract component information, read design tokens, and translate designs into code. Bridge the gap between design and development workflows.
